steps.t: Tenval has felt a curious disturbance and wishes to speak with you.
Dûgden is beneath the Mountain, in the Paths of the Dead. He shares your curse, and your feeling that something has changed.
Tenval and Dûgden were your closest friends when you walked the earth as a living man, in the days before the Curse. Now they must decide where their …
